Tests and build scripts for Pebble firmware components, including Bluetooth, graphics, UI, kernel, and utilities.

## Folders
- **[applib](applib/README.md)**: Tests for Bluetooth, app functionalities, bitmap rendering, CPU cache, persistence, text rendering, and more.
- **[apps](apps/README.md)**: Tests and build scripts for system applications and the Kickstart app.
- **[comm](comm/README.md)**: Test files for ANCS, AMS, Bluetooth, GAP, GATT, and PPoGATT functionalities, plus a build script.
- **[console](console/README.md)**: Tests and build script for COBS encoding and decoding in the Pebble firmware console.
- **[drivers](drivers/README.md)**: Tests for battery, flash API, flash erase, FPC pinstrap, I2C timing, QEMU serial, RTC calibration, and a build script.
- **[graphics](graphics/README.md)**: Tests for framebuffer operations, bit block transfers, graphics blending, drawing functions, GBitmap handling, and graphics context in the Pebble firmware, with additional utilities and build scripts.
- **[javascript](javascript/README.md)**: Tests for JavaScript functionality and Rocky API features in Pebble firmware, with a build script for unit tests.
- **[kernel](kernel/README.md)**: Tests for interval timer and pulse logging functionalities with a build script for the Pebble firmware kernel.
- **[mfg](mfg/README.md)**: Tests for manufacturing serial numbers and information functions, and a build script for test setup.
- **[pebble_actions](pebble_actions/README.md)**: Common stubs, tests for ANCS and timeline actions, test data, and a build script for Pebble firmware.
- **[services](services/README.md)**: Tests and build scripts for various Pebble firmware services, including activity, analytics, Bluetooth, and more.
- **[shell](shell/README.md)**: Tests for battery UI FSM, display calibration, system app state machine, and system theme conversion.
- **[system](system/README.md)**: Tests for flash region erasure and build script for `flash_region` testing on `tintin` platform.
- **[ui](ui/README.md)**: Tests and build scripts for UI components in the Pebble firmware, including animations, dialogs, layers, and windows.
- **[util](util/README.md)**: Tests for various utility functions in the Pebble firmware, including encoding, caching, and time operations.

## Files
- **[test_alarm.c](test_alarm.c.md)**: Tests for alarm functionalities, including creation, configuration, and management of recurring, custom, and one-time alarms.
- **[test_alarm_common.h](test_alarm_common.h.md)**: Header file for testing alarm functionality, including stubs, fakes, and helper functions for assertions.
- **[test_alarm_smart.c](test_alarm_smart.c.md)**: Tests for smart alarm functionality, including setup, triggering conditions, and behavior across time boundaries.
- **[test_alerts.c](test_alerts.c.md)**: Tests for alert notification functionality, including do-not-disturb and low power modes.
- **[test_app_manager.c](test_app_manager.c.md)**: Tests for the app manager in the Pebble firmware, including app launching, closing, and crash handling.
- **[test_app_run_state.c](test_app_run_state.c.md)**: Tests for app run state management and communication protocol in the Pebble firmware.
- **[test_battery_monitor.c](test_battery_monitor.c.md)**: Tests for the battery monitor functionality in the Pebble firmware, including state transitions and charge percentage calculations.
- **[test_char_iterator.c](test_char_iterator.c.md)**: Tests for character iterator functionality, including handling of empty, single-byte, and formatted strings.
- **[test_clar.c](test_clar.c.md)**: Tests for cl_assert macros, including integer comparisons and equality checks for GRect, GPoint, GSize, Uuid, and EllipsisDrawConfig.
- **[test_data_logging.c](test_data_logging.c.md)**: Tests for data logging functionality in the Pebble firmware, including session creation, logging, and recovery.
- **[test_debug_db.c](test_debug_db.c.md)**: Tests for the `debug_db` module, including initialization and index determination functions.
- **[test_flash_logging.c](test_flash_logging.c.md)**: Tests for flash logging functionality, including initialization, message logging, multi-region handling, and error cases.
- **[test_freertos_utils.c](test_freertos_utils.c.md)**: Tests for converting milliseconds to FreeRTOS ticks using utility functions.
- **[test_getting_started_button_combo.c](test_getting_started_button_combo.c.md)**: Tests for the "getting started" button combo functionality in the Pebble firmware.
- **[test_heap.c](test_heap.c.md)**: Tests for heap memory management functions, including allocation, reallocation, and deallocation.
- **[test_i18n.c](test_i18n.c.md)**: Tests for internationalization (i18n) functionality in the Pebble firmware, including string translation and context handling.
- **[test_launcher_app_message.c](test_launcher_app_message.c.md)**: Tests for the launcher app message functionality in the Pebble firmware, including message handling and state commands.
- **[test_line_layout.c](test_line_layout.c.md)**: Tests for line layout functionality in a graphics context, including word addition and line iteration.
- **[test_memory_layout.c](test_memory_layout.c.md)**: Tests for verifying pointer and C-string presence within specified memory regions.
- **[test_pebble_app_info.c](test_pebble_app_info.c.md)**: Tests for version comparison in Pebble app information.
- **[test_pebble_process_md.c](test_pebble_process_md.c.md)**: Tests for Pebble process metadata functions across different SDK versions and platform types.
- **[test_phone_formatting.c](test_phone_formatting.c.md)**: Tests for phone number and caller name formatting functions in the Pebble firmware.
- **[test_process_manager.c](test_process_manager.c.md)**: Tests for the process manager in the Pebble firmware, including SDK compatibility and app launch scenarios.
- **[test_resource.c](test_resource.c.md)**: Tests for resource management functions in the Pebble firmware, including loading, updating, and watching resources.
- **[test_text_layout.c](test_text_layout.c.md)**: Tests for text layout functionality, including handling of overflow, special codepoints, and text attributes.
- **[test_timeline_api.c](test_timeline_api.c.md)**: Tests for the timeline API, including item creation, attribute handling, and pinning to the timeline.
- **[test_utf8.c](test_utf8.c.md)**: Tests for UTF-8 string handling functions, including validation, decoding, copying, and truncation.
- **[test_utf8_iterator.c](test_utf8_iterator.c.md)**: Tests for UTF-8 iterator functionality, including decoding and iterating over codepoints.
- **[test_word_iterator.c](test_word_iterator.c.md)**: Tests for the word iterator functionality, including handling of empty strings and special characters.
- **[utf8_test_data.h](utf8_test_data.h.md)**: Test data for UTF-8 decoding, including valid and malformed strings, and codepoint definitions.
- **[wscript](wscript.md)**: Build script for compiling and testing various firmware components using the `clar` function.
